name: claude-hooks-related-tasks-node
tags: related tasks, load_related_tasks, neighbors, TurboVec, embeddings, tasks_embeddings, Ollama, nomic-embed-text, semantic search, done tasks
body: load_related_tasks embeds active task title+body via Ollama (nomic-embed-text) and queries .tasks_embeddings.tvim (TurboVec) for top semantically similar tasks filtered to status=done, capped at 3. Index rebuilt automatically on MCP server startup if missing; incrementally upserted on tasks__create, tasks__finish, tasks__set_active. Empty results are normal for novel tasks with no prior done neighbours. Injected as "## Related past tasks" in system prompt.
